summary:
The statement "there is no drug available to prevent HIV infection" is false. Pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP), such as tenofovir and emtricitabine, has been FDA-approved for preventing HIV infection when taken consistently by individuals at high risk of exposure. Answer: Yes.
